titleZh: 中国公司董事勤勉义务的实证与比较研究
titleEn: Directors’ Duty of Care in China: Empirical and Comparative Perspective
abstractZh: 结合中国现行制度与英美标准，评估公司董事注意义务的认定逻辑与司法执行可能性。
abstractEn: Compares practical duty-of-care treatment under the PRC Company Law with common-law models and discusses implications for Chinese adjudication.
